name: EMCO Limited
summary: EMCO Limited provides products and solutions for power generation, transmission, and distribution utilities and industries in India. It offers distribution, power, furnace, rectifier, traction power, and locomotive transformers to power utilities, steel mills, cement plants, petro chemical complexes, fertilizer plants, independent power plants, etc.; and static energy meters and metering solutions that support communication through various media for use in residential, commercial, industrial, and special purpose applications. The company also undertakes turnkey EPC projects ranging from concept to commissioning in substations, including GIS, industrial switchyards, and power distribution systems, as well as up-gradation and revamping of existing distribution systems and power evacuation system for power projects. In addition, it offers EPC solutions that include conceptualization and commissioning of EHV transmission line packages on turnkey basis. Further, the company provides repair, overhauling, erection, testing, commissioning, maintenance contract, and diagnosis and failure analysis report services for transformers, as well as supplies spares of transformers. Additionally, it is involved in solar power generation business. EMCO Limited serves power utilities, oil and gas companies, and mining and EPC companies. The company also exports its products and solutions to approximately 50 countries in Africa, the Americas, Europe, the Middle-East, and the Asia Pacific. EMCO Limited was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Thane, India.
